  1. com.societegenerale.failover.core.report

Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Reporting and metrics publication for the failover lifecycle.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report used by com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
    Class
    Description
    CompositeReportPublisher
    ReportPublisher that fans metrics out to a list of delegate publishers.
    FailoverReporter
    Publishes a startup summary of all detected @Failover configurations.
    ReportPublisher
    SPI for publishing failover metrics to an external sink (log, metrics system, event bus, etc.).
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report used by com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
    Class
    Description
    AbstractReportPublisher
    Base ReportPublisher that stamps each Metrics object with the current timestamp before delegating to AbstractReportPublisher.doPublish(Metrics).
    Event
    Structured technical event that writes its attributes to MDC before emitting a single INFO log line.
    FailoverReporter
    Publishes a startup summary of all detected @Failover configurations.
    Metrics
    Mutable key-value bag for failover metrics, keyed with a "failover-" prefix.
    ReportPublisher
    SPI for publishing failover metrics to an external sink (log, metrics system, event bus, etc.).
